ddls:
CREATE TABLE "proteins" (
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protein */,
  "protein_name" TEXT /* Name of the protein */,
  "pdb_id" TEXT /* PDB ID of the protein structure */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source of the protein data */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the protein */,
  "sequence" TEXT /* Sequence of the protein */,
  "structure" TEXT /* 3D structure of the protein */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the protein data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the protein data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protein_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_proteins_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES protein_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "residues" (
  "residue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each residue */,
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the protein the residue belongs to */,
  "resID" INTEGER /* Residue ID in the protein structure */,
  "chain" TEXT /* Chain to which the residue belongs */,
  "residue_name" TEXT /* Name of the residue (e.g., Alanine, Lysine) */,
  "residue_position" INTEGER /* Position of the residue in the protein sequence */,
  "atom_positions" TEXT /* 3D positions of the residue's atoms */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the residue data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the residue data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("residue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_residues_protein_id FOREIGN KEY ("protein_id") REFERENCES proteins ("protein_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "residue_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "residue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the residue involved in the interaction */,
  "probe_contacts" INTEGER /* Number of probe contacts for the residue */,
  "zscore" REAL /* Z-score of the residue's interactions */,
  "percentile_score" INTEGER /* Percentile score of the residue's interactions */,
  "interaction_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of interaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the interaction data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the interaction data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_residue_interactions_residue_id FOREIGN KEY ("residue_id") REFERENCES residues ("residue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_residue_interactions_interaction_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_type_id") REFERENCES interaction_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "protein_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source (e.g., Experimental, Computational) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protein being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the protein data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the protein data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_protein_id FOREIGN KEY ("protein_id") REFERENCES proteins ("protein_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "protein_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protein being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protein_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protein_comments_protein_id FOREIGN KEY ("protein_id") REFERENCES proteins ("protein_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "residue_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "residue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the residue being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_residue_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_residue_comments_residue_id FOREIGN KEY ("residue_id") REFERENCES residues ("residue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "protein_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protein being versioned */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the protein data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the version data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the version data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protein_versions_protein_id FOREIGN KEY ("protein_id") REFERENCES proteins ("protein_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interaction_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the interaction type (e.g., Hydrogen Bond, Salt Bridge) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the interaction type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "residue_interaction_networks" (
  "network_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network */,
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the protein */,
  "residue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the residue */,
  "network_type" TEXT /* Type of the network (e.g., hydrogen bond network, salt bridge network) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the network data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the network data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("network_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_residue_interaction_networks_residue_id FOREIGN KEY ("residue_id") REFERENCES residues ("residue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_residue_interaction_networks_protein_id FOREIGN KEY ("protein_id") REFERENCES proteins ("protein_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "residue_surface_accessibility" (
  "accessibility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accessibility score */,
  "residue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the residue */,
  "accessibility_score" REAL /* Surface accessibility score of the residue */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the accessibility data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the accessibility data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("accessibility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_residue_surface_accessibility_residue_id FOREIGN KEY ("residue_id") REFERENCES residues ("residue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "residue_conservation" (
  "conservation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conservation score */,
  "residue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the residue */,
  "conservation_score" REAL /* Conservation score of the residue */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the conservation data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the conservation data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conservation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_residue_conservation_residue_id FOREIGN KEY ("residue_id") REFERENCES residues ("residue_id")
)
